name: Feature Request

title: '[FEATURE] '

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Who benefits from it?

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've thought about and why they're inferior.

## Impact

- [ ] Smart contract change required
- [ ] Frontend / UX only
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Off-chain tooling

## Additional context

References, prior art in other protocols, mock-ups, math.
